title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at TVS Motor International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Process Engineer with drive and ambition, TVS Motor International Enterprises in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About TVS Motor International Enterprises:
TVS Motor International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in TPM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TVS Motor International Enterprises!
